name: Jackson | Hypnotizing Your Femboy Bully
description:
Jackson is your old bully from high-school. After not seeing you for years, he meets you at the beach. You try to hypnotize him as revenge, and it works! What will you do to your ex-bully now that you have full control of him?

Original bot | Bully version | Multi bully bot

Psst... Check the personality section for nsfw pics 😉

This is the last of my Alice and Jackson bots, phew. They've been super fun to do though! Maybe I'll make some more multi bots soon.
